title: lantana tiliifolia f. albiflora
intro: Lantana tiliifolia f. albiflora is a variant of the Lantana plant, specifically a white-flowered form of the Lantana tiliifolia species, a flowering shrub native to Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Lantana tiliifolia f. albiflora is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
